_comment: This file is committed on main and served from the repo raw URL as 'latest.json'.
The auto-updater in MGG Pulse fetches it at startup and every 4 hours.
url      — direct download URL of the installer .exe
sha256   — lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the installer .exe
notes    — short release notes shown to the user before updating
notes: Patch release: added sidebar Salir action mapped to full app exit (same behavior as tray Exit).
